cmd/Cmd/emptyline.name: emptyline
cmd/Cmd/emptyline.description: Method called when an empty line is entered in response to the prompt. If this method is not overridden, it repeats the last nonempty command entered.

info.excerpt: Method called when an empty line is entered in response to the prompt. If this method is not overridden, it repeats the last nonempty command entered.
